title: Wheesper: Private conversations, honest answers
content_html:
Private conversations, candid answers

Make room for what people really think.

The easiest way for teams to discuss what people won’t say in a meeting.

Private by link

No directory and no search. Only people with your high-entropy link can enter.

Anonymous by default

Participants get a consistent pseudonym without sharing their name or email.

Built for discussion

Threaded replies and live updates keep thoughtful conversations easy to follow.

content_html_zh:
Private conversations, candid answers

为人们的真实想法腾出空间。

团队讨论人们在会议中不会说的话的最简单方法。

通过链接私有

没有目录，也没有搜索。 只有拥有你的高熵链接的人才能进入。

默认匿名

参与者无需透露姓名或电子邮件即可获得一致的笔名。

专为讨论而建

线索式回复和实时更新让深思熟虑的对话易于理解。
